ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main author of the study */,
  "published_year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hypothesis being tested */,
  "support_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the support status of the hypothesis */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Exact date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the study */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the stored study file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_support_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("support_status_id") REFERENCES support_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypotheses" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hypothesis */,
  "hypothesis_text" TEXT /* Text of the hypothesis being tested */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or context of the hypothesis */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hypothesis (e.g., cultural, social) */,
  "related_hypotheses" TEXT /* IDs of related hypotheses */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference where the hypothesis was first proposed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the support status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the support status (e.g., Supported, Not Supported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study which includes this variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable tested */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was added */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the cited work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, reviewer, admin) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being updated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_tags" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the feedback (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent research area (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_research_areas" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "area_id")
)
